plugins.name: understanding
plugins.description: Understanding is the New Bottleneck, operationalized. /explain-diff generates a self-contained interactive explainer for any diff or PR (Background → Intuition → Code → self-checking Quiz), verified against the diff before emission. /understanding-gate grades a human's quiz against the diff and mints an unforgeable pass token, with an opt-in pre-push gate. Portable: depends on nothing project-specific and touches only .understanding/.
